text: Apple MacBook Pro laptops use Intel or Apple Silicon (M1, M2, M3, M4) processors. Common RAM sizes are 8GB, 16GB, and 32GB. MacBooks often have SSD storage.
Dell XPS 13 is a popular ultrabook with Intel Core i5 or i7 processors, 8GB or 16GB RAM, and SSD storage.
Lenovo ThinkPad series laptops are known for their durability and often use Intel Core processors.
MacBooks typically run macOS as their operating system.
Screen sizes for laptops are usually between 11 and 17 inches.
On Apple Silicon MacBooks, the RAM is called 'Unified Memory' and is integrated into the chip, meaning it cannot be upgraded by the user after purchase.
The 'Touch Bar' was a feature on some MacBook Pro models from 2016 to 2020, replacing the physical function keys with a dynamic OLED touch strip.
Common MacBook colors include Silver, Space Gray (avaruusharmaa), Gold (kulta), and Midnight (keskiyö).
Common SSD storage sizes for MacBooks start at 256GB or 512GB and can be configured up to 1TB, 2TB, 4TB, or 8TB.
If the laptop is a MacBook, categorize the model as 'MacBook Pro' or 'MacBook Air' (if unclear use null).

If the laptop has a Intel processor, label it as 'Processor_branding': 'Core Ultra 7, Core i5, Core i7, etc. if mentioned', 'Processor_model': '14900F, 14700F, 14600K, etc. ONLY IF THEY ARE MENTIONED IN THE LISTING
If the laptop has a Apple Silicon processor, label it as 'Processor_branding': 'Apple', 'Processor_model': 'M1, M2, M3, M4, etc.' ONLY IF THEY ARE MENTIONED IN THE LISTING
NVIDIA GeForce RTX 3080 is a high-end graphics card used in gaming desktops.
Intel Core i7-12700K is a 12th generation desktop CPU.
Common desktop RAM sizes are 8GB, 16GB, and 32GB.
Windows 10 and Windows 11 are common operating systems for desktop computers.
Desktop storage is often 256GB, 512GB, or 1TB SSD or HDD.
Samsung Galaxy S21 is a smartphone with 8GB RAM and 128GB or 256GB storage.
iPhone 13 comes in 128GB, 256GB, and 512GB storage options. Battery health is often reported as a percentage.
Xiaomi Redmi Note series are affordable Android smartphones.
Common smartphone colors include black, white, blue, and gold.
If a listing is for a phone case or charger, is_phone should be false.
Samsung Galaxy S series models (e.g., Galaxy S23, S23+, S23 Ultra) are flagship Android smartphones.
Samsung Galaxy A series models (e.g., Galaxy A14, A34, A54) are mid‑range Android smartphones.
Samsung Galaxy M series models (e.g., Galaxy M13, M23, M33) are budget‑oriented Android smartphones.
Samsung Galaxy Note series models (e.g., Galaxy Note10, Note20) are high‑end Android smartphones with stylus support.
Samsung Galaxy Z series foldables (e.g., Galaxy Z Flip5, Z Fold5) are premium Android smartphones with foldable displays.
Oppo Find series models (e.g., Find X5, Find X6 Pro) are flagship Android smartphones.
Oppo Reno series models (e.g., Reno8, Reno10) are mid‑range Android smartphones focusing on camera performance.
Oppo A series models (e.g., A16, A78) are entry‑level Android smartphones.
Oppo F series models (e.g., F19 Pro, F21 Pro) are budget‑friendly Android smartphones optimized for social media and selfies.
Oppo’s foldable lineup (e.g., Find N2 Fold) are premium Android devices with foldable screens.
AOC 24G2U is a 24-inch IPS gaming monitor with 144Hz refresh rate and 1ms latency.
Dell UltraSharp monitors are known for their high color accuracy and use IPS panels.
Common monitor sizes are 22, 24, 27, and 32 inches.
Monitor resolutions: Full HD is 1920x1080, QHD is 2560x1440, 4K is 3840x2160.
Panel technologies: TN is fast but has poor colors, IPS has good colors and viewing angles, VA has high contrast.
DDR4 and DDR5 are common RAM types for PC components.
NVMe SSDs are faster than SATA SSDs or HDDs.
ATX, Micro-ATX, and Mini-ITX are common motherboard form factors.
Power supplies are rated in watts, e.g., 550W, 650W, 750W.
CPU sockets: Intel LGA1200, LGA1700; AMD AM4, AM5.
Year should be a four-digit integer if mentioned, e.g., 2021.
Do not include year into Model field: For example 2013 UltraSlim Docking Station -> UltraSlim Docking Station ect..
Intel Core i3 series models (e.g., i3‑10100, i3‑12100) are entry‑level desktop CPUs suitable for everyday tasks.
Intel Core i5 series models (e.g., i5‑12400, i5‑13400) are mid‑range desktop CPUs offering a balance of performance and efficiency.
Intel Core i7 series models (e.g., i7‑12700, i7‑13700K) are high‑performance desktop CPUs for demanding applications.
Intel Core i9 series models (e.g., i9‑12900K, i9‑13900KS) are flagship desktop CPUs with the highest core counts and clock speeds.
AMD Ryzen 3 series models (e.g., 3300X, 4100) are entry‑level desktop CPUs offering solid multi‑threaded performance.
AMD Ryzen 5 series models (e.g., 5600X, 7600) are mid‑range desktop CPUs with strong gaming and productivity performance.
AMD Ryzen 7 series models (e.g., 5800X, 7700X) are high‑performance desktop CPUs with 8 cores and 16 threads.
AMD Ryzen 9 series models (e.g., 5900X, 7950X) are flagship desktop CPUs with 12–16 cores for superior multi‑tasking and content creation.
AMD Ryzen Threadripper series models (e.g., 3960X, 7970X) are enthusiast‑grade desktop CPUs with up to 64 cores.
NVIDIA GeForce GTX 16 series GPUs (e.g., GTX 1650, GTX 1660 Super) are budget to mid‑range graphics cards based on Turing architecture.
NVIDIA GeForce RTX 10 series GPUs (e.g., RTX 1060, RTX 1080 Ti) are mid‑range graphics cards based on Pascal architecture.
NVIDIA GeForce RTX 20 series GPUs (e.g., RTX 2060, RTX 2080 Ti) introduced real‑time ray tracing and AI‑accelerated features.
NVIDIA GeForce RTX 30 series GPUs (e.g., RTX 3060, RTX 3090) deliver high‑end performance with improved ray tracing and DLSS.
NVIDIA GeForce RTX 40 series GPUs (e.g., RTX 4070, RTX 4090) are the latest flagship graphics cards offering extreme performance and efficiency.
AMD Radeon RX 6000 series GPUs (e.g., RX 6600 XT, RX 6900 XT) are based on RDNA 2 architecture with hardware‑accelerated ray tracing.
AMD Radeon RX 7000 series GPUs (e.g., RX 7700 XT, RX 7900 XTX) use RDNA 3 architecture for even higher performance and power efficiency.
GeForce GTX 1080 Ti is a graphics card with 11GB of VRAM by different board partners (OEMs) such as ASUS, MSI, EVGA, Gigabyte, and Zotac.
Nintendo Switch is a hybrid video game console that can be used in handheld or docked mode.
Nintendo Switch Lite is a handheld-only version of the Nintendo Switch.
Nintendo Switch OLED Model is an upgraded Switch with a 7-inch OLED screen and enhanced audio.
Sony PlayStation 4 is an eighth‑generation home video game console.
Sony PlayStation 4 Pro is an enhanced PS4 with 4K output and improved performance.
Sony PlayStation 5 is a ninth‑generation home video game console featuring a custom SSD and 3D audio.
Sony PlayStation 5 Digital Edition is a disc‑less version of the PS5 at a lower price point.
Sony PlayStation 5 Pro is an enhanced PS5 model with upgraded GPU and support for 4K 120Hz gaming.
Microsoft Xbox One is an eighth‑generation home video game console.
Microsoft Xbox One S is a slimmer, more energy‑efficient version of the Xbox One with 4K video playback.
Microsoft Xbox One X is an enhanced Xbox One with true 4K gaming and improved GPU performance.
Microsoft Xbox Series X is a ninth‑generation home video game console featuring 12 TFLOPS GPU and ultra‑fast SSD.
Microsoft Xbox Series S is the digital‑only, lower‑cost version of the Xbox Series X with 4 TFLOPS GPU.
Nintendo Wii is a seventh‑generation home video game console with motion‑sensing controls.
Nintendo Wii U is the successor to the Wii, featuring a tablet‑style GamePad controller.
Sony PlayStation 3 is a seventh‑generation home video game console with Blu‑ray support.
Sony PlayStation Vita is a handheld video game console with OLED (original) or LCD (PCH-2000) screen options.
Nintendo 3DS is a handheld video game console with stereoscopic 3D screen technology.
G920 is a racing wheel controller for gaming consoles and PCs from brand Logitech.
DualSense is the controller for PlayStation 5, featuring haptic feedback and adaptive triggers.
Xbox Elite Series 2 is a premium controller for Xbox consoles with customizable features.
Nintendo Switch Pro Controller is an enhanced controller for the Nintendo Switch with motion controls.
Razer Wolverine Ultimate is a high‑performance controller for Xbox consoles and PCs.
T300 RS GT is a racing wheel designed for PlayStation and PC gaming from brand Thrustmaster.
